meaning: n.蛹,茧,任何在形成中而尚未至完全成熟阶段的事物
examples: It's a pattern repeated when he quit his degree to work for independent music publisher Chrysalis.
There's a story about a man so eager to "help" a butterfly into the world that he opens its chrysalis too soon.
If the butterfly doesn't struggle to get out of the chrysalis, it can't fly!
Many necessitated payments to songwriters and the music publishers, like Chrysalis, that represent them.
But enough decent banks emerged from the chrysalis of the Asian crisis for lending to resume.
